response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement (19 years) and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with current work in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows. However, the role requires strategic AI expertise with demonstrated products and customer/partner advisory experience. While the current re:cinq position on MCP frameworks is promising, the resume shows limited historical depth in AI product innovation or strategic technology advisory—core responsibilities for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. The candidate appears to be transitioning into AI infrastructure rather than being a recognized AI strategy expert.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 19 years across full-stack, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure with MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq, directly aligned with strategic technology focus
Demonstrates entrepreneurial builder mentality as founder of GISCollective platform and strong track record of technical thought leadership through workshops and talks
concerns: Limited demonstrated track record in strategic AI product development or recognized AI expertise; current AI work is infrastructure-focused rather than strategy-focused
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification) and no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption
Career trajectory shows primarily individual contributor roles; limited evidence of identifying and leading future-state technology strategies across organizations
